name: tamer-icons
description: Icon fonts for Lynx: Material Icons, Font Awesome. Tfont, GoogleIcons, FontAwesome components.

scripts.build: npm run fetch-fonts && node scripts/generate-codepoints.mjs && npm run copy-android-fonts && tsc && cp src/fonts.css dist/
scripts.copy-android-fonts: mkdir -p android/src/main/assets/fonts && cp fonts/*.ttf android/src/main/assets/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true

author: Nanofuxion
